! Title: ShieldNova - Full (Global)
! Description: Complete protection with a conservative compatibility-first profile.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-30 16:22:05 UTC
! Total: 667
! Breakdown: privacy=56, ads=59, security=554, deduped_total=667, allowlist_removed=0

! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Privacy / Global Core
! Blocks major global analytics, attribution, session replay, and telemetry.
!
! SAFETY: Only low-risk tracking and telemetry domains are included here.
! Avoids login, payments, app content delivery, deep links, CAPTCHAs, and
! other domains that commonly affect normal app or website functionality.
! ============================================================================

! --- Google Analytics & Tracking ---
||google-analytics.com^                     ! Google Analytics - web/app usage tracking
||googletagmanager.com^                     ! Google Tag Manager - tag deployment & tracking
||googletagservices.com^                    ! Google Publisher Tag - ad serving & tracking
||googleadservices.com^                     ! Google Ads - conversion tracking
||doubleclick.net^                          ! Google DoubleClick - display ad tracking
||app-measurement.com^                      ! Firebase Analytics - mobile app measurement
||crashlytics.com^                          ! Firebase Crashlytics - crash reporting telemetry

! --- Meta / Facebook (tracking-only endpoints) ---
||pixel.facebook.com^                       ! Facebook Pixel - cross-site conversion tracking
||analytics.facebook.com^                   ! Facebook Analytics endpoint
! because they are required for Facebook Login and social features.

! --- Mobile Attribution (pure tracking SDKs, no user features) ---
||adjust.com^                               ! Adjust - mobile install attribution
||appsflyer.com^                            ! AppsFlyer - mobile attribution platform
||kochava.com^                              ! Kochava - mobile attribution
||singular.net^                             ! Singular - marketing analytics
||tenjin.com^                               ! Tenjin - mobile ad revenue analytics
! share URLs. Blocking breaks "open in app" functionality.

! --- Product Analytics & Session Replay ---
||mixpanel.com^                             ! Mixpanel - user behavior analytics
||amplitude.com^                            ! Amplitude - product analytics
||segment.io^                               ! Segment - customer data pipeline
||segment.com^                              ! Segment - customer data platform
||heapanalytics.com^                        ! Heap - auto-capture analytics
||hotjar.com^                               ! Hotjar - heatmaps & session recording
||fullstory.com^                            ! FullStory - session replay
||mouseflow.com^                            ! Mouseflow - session replay & heatmaps
||clarity.ms^                               ! Microsoft Clarity - session recording
||logrocket.com^                            ! LogRocket - session replay and diagnostics

! --- Error Monitoring / Telemetry ---
||bugsnag.com^                              ! Bugsnag - crash and stability telemetry
||sentry.io^                                ! Sentry - application error telemetry
||newrelic.com^                             ! New Relic - APM and user telemetry
||nr-data.net^                              ! New Relic beacon collection endpoint
||telemetrydeck.com^                        ! TelemetryDeck - anonymous app telemetry
||plausible.io^                             ! Plausible - privacy-focused analytics

! --- Ad Tracking Networks ---
! openx, rubiconproject, casalemedia, outbrain, taboola, quantserve,
! scorecardresearch, googleadservices) are in the Advertising module.
! They are not duplicated here to keep modules clean.

! --- Social Tracking (tracking-only subdomains) ---
||snap.licdn.com^                           ! LinkedIn Insight Tag - conversion tracking
||ads.linkedin.com^                         ! LinkedIn Ads - tracking pixel
||sc-static.net^                            ! Snapchat - ad tracking SDK
||tr.snapchat.com^                          ! Snapchat - conversion tracking pixel
! they serve embedded content (tweets, LinkedIn posts) on websites.

! --- Marketing Automation (pure tracking infra) ---
||actonservice.com^                         ! Act-On - marketing automation tracking
||marketo.com^                              ! Marketo - marketing automation tracking
||marketo.net^                              ! Marketo - tracking delivery network
||pardot.com^                               ! Pardot - B2B marketing tracking
||eloqua.com^                               ! Oracle Eloqua - marketing automation tracking
||omtrdc.net^                               ! Adobe Analytics - data collection endpoint
||demdex.net^                               ! Adobe Audience Manager - audience tracking
||2o7.net^                                  ! Adobe/Omniture - legacy analytics tracking
||everesttech.net^                          ! Adobe Advertising - ad tracking

! --- Fingerprinting (pure fingerprinting, safe to block) ---
||fingerprintjs.com^                        ! FingerprintJS - browser fingerprinting
! CAPTCHAs and bot verification. Blocking prevents login on many sites.

! --- Consent / Cookie Tracking ---
||cookiebot.com^                            ! Cookiebot - cookie consent tracking
||cookieinformation.com^                    ! Cookie Information - consent tracking
||onetrust.com^                             ! OneTrust - privacy consent management
||trustarc.com^                             ! TrustArc - privacy compliance tracking
||cookielaw.org^                            ! OneTrust - cookie consent CDN

! --- A/B Testing & Optimization ---
||optimizely.com^                           ! Optimizely - A/B testing & experimentation
||launchdarkly.com^                         ! LaunchDarkly - feature flag & experimentation
||vwo.com^                                  ! VWO - A/B testing & conversion optimization
||abtasty.com^                              ! AB Tasty - A/B testing platform

! --- Email Tracking ---
||mailtrack.io^                             ! Mailtrack - email open tracking
||yesware.com^                              ! Yesware - email tracking for sales
||bananatag.com^                            ! Bananatag - email tracking
! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Advertising / Global Core
! Low-risk ad networks, exchanges, and ad-serving domains.
!
! SAFETY: Includes clear ad infrastructure only. Avoids domains commonly used
! for site hosting, logins, static assets, payments, or app core APIs.
! ============================================================================

! --- Google / Major Ad Delivery ---
||googlesyndication.com^                    ! Google AdSense / ad delivery
||pagead2.googlesyndication.com^            ! Google AdSense page-level ads
||adservice.google.com^                     ! Google ad service endpoint

! --- Programmatic / DSP / SSP ---
||adnxs.com^                                ! Xandr/AppNexus ad exchange
||adsrvr.org^                               ! The Trade Desk ad delivery
||pubmatic.com^                             ! PubMatic ad exchange
||rubiconproject.com^                       ! Magnite/Rubicon ad exchange
||openx.net^                                ! OpenX ad marketplace
||sharethrough.com^                         ! Sharethrough native ads
||bidswitch.net^                            ! BidSwitch exchange routing
||lijit.com^                                ! Sovrn / Lijit ad serving
||media.net^                                ! Media.net contextual ads
||serving-sys.com^                          ! Sizmek ad serving
||casalemedia.com^                          ! Index Exchange ad marketplace
||indexww.com^                              ! Index Exchange - wrapper
||33across.com^                             ! 33Across ad exchange
||smartadserver.com^                        ! Equativ/Smart AdServer
||yieldmo.com^                              ! Yieldmo ad exchange
||triplelift.com^                           ! TripleLift native ad exchange
||sonobi.com^                               ! Sonobi ad exchange
||emxdgt.com^                               ! EMX Digital ad exchange
||contextweb.com^                           ! PulsePoint ad exchange
||adcolony.com^                             ! AdColony mobile ad network
||vungle.com^                               ! Vungle mobile video ads
||unityads.unity3d.com^                     ! Unity Ads - mobile ad delivery
||unityads.unitychina.cn^                   ! Unity Ads China - mobile ad delivery
||applovin.com^                             ! AppLovin mobile ad network
||ironsrc.com^                              ! ironSource mobile ad mediation
||mintegral.com^                            ! Mintegral mobile ad network
||inmobi.com^                               ! InMobi mobile ad platform
||chartboost.com^                           ! Chartboost mobile game ads
||fyber.com^                                ! Fyber mobile ad mediation
||liftoff.io^                               ! Liftoff mobile ad platform
||moloco.com^                               ! Moloco mobile ad platform

! --- Retargeting / Content Ads ---
||criteo.com^                               ! Criteo retargeting ads
||criteo.net^                               ! Criteo ad delivery
||taboola.com^                              ! Taboola sponsored content
||outbrain.com^                             ! Outbrain sponsored content
||revcontent.com^                           ! RevContent native ads
||mgid.com^                                 ! MGID native ads

! --- Video / Streaming Ads ---
||springserve.com^                          ! SpringServe video ad server
||spotxchange.com^                          ! SpotX video ad exchange
||spotx.tv^                                 ! SpotX video ad delivery
||teads.tv^                                 ! Teads video ad platform

! --- Audience / Identity for Ads ---
||quantserve.com^                           ! Quantcast ad targeting
||scorecardresearch.com^                    ! comScore audience measurement
||mookie1.com^                              ! Oracle BlueKai / identity for ads
||rlcdn.com^                                ! LiveRamp ad tech CDN
||id5-sync.com^                             ! ID5 identity for ads
||adsymptotic.com^                          ! Ad identity sync
||crwdcntrl.net^                            ! Lotame audience management
||bluekai.com^                              ! Oracle BlueKai DMP
||exelator.com^                             ! Nielsen eXelator DMP
||eyeota.net^                               ! Eyeota audience data

! --- Pop-under / Interstitial Ad Networks ---
||popads.net^                               ! PopAds pop-under network
||popcash.net^                              ! PopCash pop-under network
||propellerads.com^                         ! PropellerAds pop-under / push ads

! blocking can break product pages and checkout on Amazon-owned sites.
! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Security / Phishing
! Phishing infrastructure domains with ZERO legitimate use cases.
! Only platforms and services used to host/deliver phishing are included.
! ============================================================================

! --- Phishing-as-a-service platforms ---
||16shop.co^                                ! 16Shop - phishing kit distribution platform

! --- Fake login page infrastructure ---
||logincdn.net^                             ! Fake login page CDN infrastructure

! are NOT blocked. Many users rely on them for home server remote access.
! Many forums and download sites use them for legitimate links.

! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Security / Cryptojacking
! Conservative blocklist for well-known browser mining infrastructure.
!
! SAFETY: These are mining SERVICE PROVIDERS only, not individual infected
! sites. They have zero legitimate use cases for end users.
! ============================================================================

! --- Coinhive & related (defunct but still requested by infected sites) ---
||coinhive.com^                             ! Coinhive - browser crypto miner (defunct)
||coinhiveproxy.com^                        ! Coinhive - proxy endpoint
||authedmine.com^                           ! Coinhive - opt-in miner variant
||authedmine.eu^                            ! Coinhive - opt-in miner (EU)
||authedwebmine.cz^                         ! AuthedWebMine - Coinhive fork
||cnhv.co^                                  ! Coinhive - short link / miner redirect
||wsservices.org^                           ! Coinhive - websocket endpoint

! --- CryptoLoot ---
||crypto-loot.com^                          ! CryptoLoot - Coinhive alternative
||crypto-loot.org^                          ! CryptoLoot - alternative domain
||cryptaloot.pro^                           ! CryptoLoot - proxy domain

! --- CoinImp ---
||coinimp.com^                              ! CoinImp - browser mining service
||coinimp.net^                              ! CoinImp - delivery network
||freecontent.date^                         ! CoinImp - content delivery alias
||freecontent.stream^                       ! CoinImp - content delivery alias
||freecontent.live^                         ! CoinImp - content delivery alias
||hostcontent.live^                         ! CoinImp - content delivery alias
||hostingcloud.racing^                      ! CoinImp - hosting alias
||hostingcloud.party^                       ! CoinImp - hosting alias

! --- Other mining services ---
||jsecoin.com^                              ! JSEcoin - browser mining platform
||mineralt.io^                              ! Mineralt - browser mining service
||webminepool.com^                          ! WebMinePool - browser mining pool
||browsermine.com^                          ! BrowserMine - browser mining service
||nerohut.com^                              ! NeroHut - browser mining service
||papoto.com^                               ! Papoto - browser mining service
||monerominer.rocks^                        ! MoneroMiner - browser Monero miner
||minero.cc^                                ! Minero - browser mining
||inwemo.com^                               ! InWemo - browser mining service
||minescripts.info^                         ! MineScripts - mining script host
||ad-miner.com^                             ! Ad-Miner - browser mining service
||afminer.com^                              ! AFMiner - browser mining service
||coin-service.com^                         ! CoinNebula - mining service domain
||webassembly.stream^                       ! WebAssembly mining payload delivery
||wasm.stream^                              ! WASM mining payload delivery
||adless.io^                                ! Adless - mining-as-ad-replacement
